title: tomophyllum subminutum
intro: Tomophyllum subminutum, also known as the minute polypody fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tomophyllum subminutum include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant to protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, or made into a decoction with water to extract its medicinal properties.
